examples: As a dramatist, I hate to moralize.
He was contemporary with the dramatist Congreve.
As the great contemporary poet and dramatist Ben Jonson said, "He was not of an age, but for all time."
And, being a contrarian and a dramatist, Mr. Mamet doubtless relishes the attention for his heresy.
His translations introduced the English to Jean Anouilh, a French dramatist whom they came to like much better than himself.
